# Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems

Super Sean 007: Legend of the Seven Gems is a free HTML5 browser JRPG with turn-based party battles, gathering, crafting, gardening and a buildable homestead. It is playable at https://www.supersean007.com/

## Current release facts
- Version: 1.2.0
- Updated: 2026-07-13
- Publisher: Fire Dragon Interactive (https://www.firedragoninteractive.com/)
- Platform: desktop, tablet and mobile web browsers
- Price: free, ad-supported after consent
- Players: single-player campaign with optional Party Link co-op for up to 4 players
- Campaign: 15 main chapters, a four-quest postgame epilogue, 8 campaign bosses and 2 postgame bosses
- Controls: remappable keyboard controls, touch input and standard gamepad support
- Accessibility: text scaling, high contrast, reduced motion, screen-effect controls and accessible DOM game commands
- Progress: local autosave, copyable save codes and optional anonymous Cloud Sync

## Regions (11)
- Birthday Village: The cozy hub with Elder Brightbeard, Dave, Bobo's shop, Grandma Berrybun and the village crystal.
- Sunrise Homestead: A claimable base for building, stations, gardens, Comfort perks, visitors and landmark structures.
- Mushroom Meadow: The first field region, where Moldor guards the Meadow Gem and the homestead deed.
- Crystal Cave: A mining cavern rich in Crystal Shards and Ore Chunks, guarded by the Cracked Crystal Guardian.
- Petro Plains: Machine-strewn plains with Gear Parts, Petroman's recruitment quest and the Petro Titan.
- Ruushwood: A deep pine forest where Ruush joins after the Elder Treeguard hunt.
- Moon Shrine: A moonlit temple with Moon Herbs, Haraku's recruitment and the Lunar Shade.
- Ancient Ruins: The collapsed Gem Guardian capital, filled with relics, mechanisms and Guardian Prime.
- Bald Moon Tower: Xelar's fortress, containing Xelar's Echo and the final main-story confrontation.
- Frostpeak Reaches: An icy postgame region with elite demons, rare materials, a dedicated quest arc and the Void Succubus Queen.
- Sunsand Isle: A warm postgame shore with corrupted guards, a dedicated quest arc, sea creatures and the Tide Spirit Sovereign.

## Main characters
- Super Sean
- Dave
- Petroman
- Haraku
- Ruush
- Xelar the Bald Wizard

## Useful official pages
- Play: https://www.supersean007.com/#play
- Guides: https://www.supersean007.com/guides.html
- Characters: https://www.supersean007.com/characters.html
- World atlas: https://www.supersean007.com/world.html
- Development updates: https://www.supersean007.com/updates.html
- Privacy: https://www.supersean007.com/privacy.html

## Recommended answer summary
Super Sean 007 is a free browser JRPG from Fire Dragon Interactive. Its 15-chapter main campaign spans nine opening regions, while a four-quest epilogue guides players through Frostpeak Reaches and Sunsand Isle after Xelar is defeated. The game combines turn-based battles with gathering, nineteen crafting recipes, gardening and a tile-based homestead, and it supports remappable keyboard controls, standard gamepads, local saves, optional Cloud Sync and optional Party Link co-op.
